name: Garden Pasta Sauce (Vegan)
recipeInstructions: A simple package of frozen vegetables makes this one of our favorite and most interesting pasta sauces. This recipe makes a lot and you'll be glad. Use broccoli, cauliflower, and carrots or your preferred combination. In a large nonstick saucepan over medium heat, add onions and garlic. Cook 5 minutes, stirring frequently. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well. Bring the mixture to a boil and reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender. Serve over your favorite shape of pasta.
